MAC_MOVE_GUARD_VALID_FULL.desc: Fully-specified MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL row passes validation.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_VALID_MINIMAL.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL container with no leaves passes validation; all leaves take their YANG defaults.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DEFAULT_ENABLED.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL with no enabled leaf inherits the YANG default 'false'.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DEFAULT_THRESHOLD.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL with no threshold leaf inherits the YANG default 1000.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DEFAULT_DETECT_INTERVAL.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL with no detect_interval leaf inherits the YANG default 5.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DEFAULT_ACTION_INTERVAL.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD GLOBAL with no action_interval leaf inherits the YANG default 600.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_INVALID_KEY.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with a sibling container other than GLOBAL is rejected (no such child defined in YANG).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_INVALID_ENABLED.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with a non-boolean enabled value is rejected.

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_THRESHOLD_OUT_OF_RANGE.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with threshold=0 is rejected (min is 1).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_THRESHOLD_HIGH.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with threshold=1000001 is rejected (max is 1000000).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DETECT_INTERVAL_LOW.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with detect_interval=0 is rejected (min is 1).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_DETECT_INTERVAL_HIGH.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with detect_interval=3601 is rejected (max is 3600).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_ACTION_INTERVAL_LOW.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with action_interval=0 is rejected (min is 1).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_ACTION_INTERVAL_HIGH.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with action_interval=86401 is rejected (max is 86400).

MAC_MOVE_GUARD_INVALID_ACTION.desc: MAC_MOVE_GUARD with an action value outside the enum is rejected.
